channel.title: Gil Rodrigues - Gil Rodrigues Barbosa - Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa (gildrb)
channel.description: Designing brands, interfaces, and the systems that connect them.

item.title: Heph local document agent
item.author: hi@gildrb.com (Gil Rodrigues)
item.description: How Heph organizes local files into armories and keeps the evidence behind each answer inspectable.

item.title: n0thing wordmark
item.author: hi@gildrb.com (Gil Rodrigues)
item.description: A documented view of the animated n0thing wordmark and the evidence still needed to complete its case study.

item.title: mL7 identity
item.author: hi@gildrb.com (Gil Rodrigues)
item.description: A documented view of the mL7 identity and the evidence still needed to complete its case study.

item.title: Filen identity system
item.author: hi@gildrb.com (Gil Rodrigues)
item.description: How Gil Rodrigues developed Filen's identity from broad visual exploration into a scalable mark, wordmark, app icon, and campaign system.

item.title: Gil Rodrigues
item.author: hi@gildrb.com (Gil Rodrigues)
item.description: Designing brands, interfaces, and the systems that connect them.
